/opt/homebrew/opt/ccache/libexec/c++  -arch arm64 -isysroot /Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer/Platforms/MacOSX.platform/Developer/SDKs/MacOSX12.3.sdk -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/camera_pipe.generator.dir/camera_pipe_generator.cpp.o CMakeFiles/camera_pipe.generator.dir/opt/homebrew/share/tools/GenGen.cpp.o -o camera_pipe.generator  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/lib /opt/homebrew/lib/libHalide.14.0.0.dylib
